data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for package delivery photo capture.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo capture at delivery points, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The absence of concrete examples or evidence showing that this requirement is satisfied indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of photo capture functionality at delivery points.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
